_description: Slim research-side overlay of the canonical cogni-workspace/references/supported-markets-registry.json. Keys are market codes aligned with the registry. Each entry carries only research-specific operational metadata (region_qualifiers, local_language, local_query_tips, regulatory_bodies, authority_metadata{} keyed by domain). Read sites must call cogni-workspace/scripts/get-market-config.py --plugin research --market <code> to obtain the joined config in the legacy embedded shape; never read this file directly. Unknown codes fall back to '_default' (retained in legacy shape for backward compatibility).

region_qualifiers.en: China People's Republic of China Mainland China
region_qualifiers.local: 中国 中华人民共和国

reachability_notes._note: These Mainland China government domains can be intermittently unreachable from outside CN. Prefer WebSearch (quote-mining from snippets) over WebFetch; if WebFetch times out or returns blocked, fall back to the matching WebSearch snippet content rather than retrying.

regulatory_bodies: Úrad na ochranu osobných údajov SR

eu._note: Composite market — orchestrator expands to per-country researchers for market-specific sub-questions. This entry provides EU-wide sources and cross-market defaults.

_default._note: Fallback for unknown market codes. English-only, no authority boosts, no local-language queries.
